news.t: Advisors Asset Management Launches Three Active ETFs Focusing on Small Cap, Large Cap, and Dividend Growth Investments

holdings.infoBox: SAWS is an equity ETF with a total of 74 individual holdings. The top holdings are StoneX Group stock at 4.83%, BrightSpring Health Services at 3.38%, Sanmina at 3.15%, PriceSmart at 3.05%, and Guardian Pharmacy Services at 3.04%.

overview.description: The AAM Sawgrass US Small Cap Quality Growth ETF (SAWS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund actively manages a focused portfolio of US small-cap growth stocks, using quantitative and qualitative analysis for stock selection. The fund seeks risk-adjusted returns for long-term capital appreciation. SAWS was launched on Jul 30, 2024 and is issued by Advisors Asset Management.

data.title: Advisors Asset Management Launches Three Active ETFs Focusing on Small Cap, Large Cap, and Dividend Growth Investments
data.text: These new funds represent AAM's latest expansion and ongoing commitment to opportunities within the ETF space MONUMENT, Colo. , Aug. 6, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Advisors Asset Management  (AAM), a leading...
